headline: BofA sees Ford chasing a market far bigger than EVs
summary: For years electric vehicles were the auto industry's most significant growth story. That story has become more complicated. Demand has been patchy. Losses have stung. Car producers have been compelled to re-evaluate how swiftly they should invest in battery factories, electric lorries and ...

headline: Tesla Takes a Page From Ford, GM and Toyota's Playbook With the Model Y L
summary: Tesla's six-seat Model Y L could signal a strategic shift as the EV giant adopts a product strategy long used by Ford, GM and Toyota to drive growth.

raw.headline: Tesla Takes a Page From Ford, GM and Toyota's Playbook With the Model Y L
raw.summary: Tesla's six-seat Model Y L could signal a strategic shift as the EV giant adopts a product strategy long used by Ford, GM and Toyota to drive growth.

headline: Ford achieves quality milestone, as CEO targets flawless new vehicle launches
summary: Ford CEO Jim Farley told CNBC that the automaker has learned from its past quality and recall issues, which have hurt its earnings and stained its reputation.

raw.headline: Ford achieves quality milestone, as CEO targets flawless new vehicle launches
raw.summary: Ford CEO Jim Farley told CNBC that the automaker has learned from its past quality and recall issues, which have hurt its earnings and stained its reputation.

headline: Ford's EV Sales Plunge 41% in Q2 As Legacy US Automakers Struggle With Weak Demand
summary: Ford's second-quarter 2026 EV sales dropped close to 41%, amid the upcoming $30,000 EV pickup truck was spotted testing.
